name: Tink Open Banking Platform API
what_it_does: Tink open banking platform REST API for fintechs, banks, and enterprises to access financial account data, initiate instant payments, and verify income and account ownership across 3,400+ European banks in 18 countries through Visa's PSD2-compliant open banking infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage account data aggregation for personal finance and financial data automation, handle payment initiation for EU instant bank payment automation, access income verification and account ownership for lending and financial verification automation, retrieve transaction enrichment and categorization for financial analytics automation, manage risk scoring and fraud assessment for credit decision automation, handle data connection and consent management for open banking authorization automation, access balance and credit data for real-time financial assessment automation, retrieve account number and IBAN verification for payment validation automation, manage multi-bank aggregation for European financial health monitoring automation, and integrate Tink with banking, lending, insurance, and fintech platforms for end-to-end European open banking automation.
use_cases: Aggregating EU bank account data from personal finance management agents
Verifying income and account ownership from lending decision agents
Initiating instant EU payments from open banking checkout agents
Enriching and categorizing transactions from financial analytics agents
not_for: UK-first open banking (use TrueLayer or GoCardless for UK PSD2 focus)
US open banking (use Plaid for US bank account data)
Card payment acceptance (Tink is bank-to-bank open banking only)
best_when: A European fintech, bank, or lender wanting AI agents to automate bank account data aggregation, income verification, payment initiation, and transaction enrichment across 3,400+ European banks through Visa's open banking infrastructure.
avoid_when: BANK REDIRECT SCA REQUIREMENT: Tink payments and data connections require customer Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) redirect to their bank; automated payment or data access must redirect customer to bank authentication; automated server-side access without SCA creates PSD2 compliance violation. CONSENT SCOPE AND DURATION MANAGEMENT: Tink data connections have PSD2-mandated consent periods (typically 90 days); automated financial data workflows must track and renew consent before expiry; automated data access after consent expiry creates unauthorized access error requiring customer re-authentication. BANK COVERAGE VARIES BY COUNTRY: Tink 3,400+ bank coverage varies significantly by country (strong in Nordics, growing in Southern Europe); automated European bank connectivity must verify specific bank support; automated assumption of universal coverage creates unsupported bank error for smaller national banks. TRANSACTION ENRICHMENT ACCURACY LIMITATION: Tink transaction categorization uses ML models with variable accuracy; automated financial insights must handle miscategorized transactions; automated decision-making fully reliant on Tink category labels creates downstream error from AI misclassification.

auth.notes: Tink uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials and authorization code for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Stockholm, Sweden HQ. Founded 2012 by Daniel Kjellén and Fredrik Hedberg. Acquired by Visa in 2022 ($2.1B). Products: Account aggregation, payment initiation, income verification, risk insights, transaction enrichment. SDKs: Java, Python, Node.js. GDPR. PSD2. 18 European countries. 3,400+ banks. Competes with TrueLayer, Yapily, and Nordigen for EU open banking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox free; production requires commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-connection and per-call pricing; custom enterprise contracts for volume
pricing.notes: Stockholm SE. Visa subsidiary. Per-call/connection pricing. Commercial agreement for production access.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per client; data and payment APIs throttled; webhooks for connection and payment status events

known_agent_gotchas: USER AUTHORIZATION CODE FLOW FOR DATA ACCESS: Tink account data access requires per-user OAuth authorization code flow; automated data aggregation must redirect each user to Tink authorization URL; automated client-credentials-only data access without user OAuth creates unauthorized user data access

CREDENTIALS PROVIDER vs OPEN BANKING: Tink supports both Credentials (screen scraping legacy) and Open Banking (PSD2 API); automated integration should prefer Open Banking provider for PSD2 compliance; automated Credentials provider use for PSD2-compliant banks creates deprecated method warning and reduced reliability

PAYMENT TRANSFER OBJECT IMMUTABILITY: Tink payment transfer objects are immutable after creation; automated payment correction requires cancellation and new payment creation; automated update of existing payment amount or beneficiary creates immutable object error

WEBHOOK DELIVERY ORDERING NOT GUARANTEED: Tink webhook events may arrive out of order; automated state machine processing must handle out-of-order events; automated strict sequential event processing creates state inconsistency on delayed webhook delivery

INCOME VERIFICATION REQUIRES SUFFICIENT TRANSACTION HISTORY: Tink income verification requires 3+ months of transaction history; automated income verification for new bank connections with limited history creates insufficient data error; automated income check must verify history depth before calling income verification endpoint
agent_readiness.security_notes: EU open banking. GDPR, PSD2. OAuth2. EU. Bank account, financial, and payment data. Visa subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: EU open banking. GDPR, PSD2. OAuth2. EU. Bank account and financial data.
